name: Bougainvillea Blossom (Lesser)
description:
Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)

This pink flower has long, slender thorns along the stem. The flower can be used as a catalyst when casting an Entangling Flora spell, which causes the affected plants to sprout long thorns and vibrant pink blossoms. The area becomes hazardous terrain, dealing 1 piercing damage to an enemy each time it enters an affected square.
